projectsHeader.title: Projects
projectsHeader.description: This is what a free time gets me

projects.name: Personal Portfolio
projects.description: This very site — an animated portfolio with a custom parallax gallery engine, GSAP scroll-linked motion, Lenis smooth scroll, and a CSS-driven light/dark theme.

projects.name: Giteractive
projects.description: An interactive Git visualizer that lets users run Git commands and watch the commit graph, branches, and staging area update in real time on a node-based canvas.

projects.name: Enlightened Fellows Discord Bot
projects.description: A TypeScript Discord bot running two subsystems in one process: a Discord.js v14 bot and an Elysia HTTP API, sharing a DDD-lite domain layer. Features a custom Monster Hunter Wilds armor set-search engine (DFS combination optimizer over an in-memory index), scheduled cron jobs for MH Wilds events and Genshin code alerts, and a Drizzle/Postgres data layer on Supabase.
